idea.title: Sausage Beam
idea.hook: Roll a laser-mounted sausage around a ring arena — momentum aims the beam, but the beam's recoil pushes you toward the edge.
idea.hook_ru: Катайте сосиску с лазером по круглой арене — направление движения наводит луч, но отдача толкает вас к краю.
idea.prototype: 600x600 circular arena. WASD apply force to long-capsule body. Laser fires continuously from one end; firing applies recoil opposite to beam direction. Enemies spawn at ring edge, walk inward. Touching ring edge OR enemy = death. 5 waves, +2 enemies each.
idea.mutation_of: Telegram BaxxStudio sausage-with-laser meme (baxxstudio/4585) + CrazyGames ragdoll cluster (Ragdoll Factory Idle, Fun Ragdoll Challenge, Stickman Hook)
idea.why_novel: Every laser/shooter has stable aim. This couples aim to momentum AND adds firing recoil — shooting harder makes you harder to control. No reverse-physics arena shooter on these portals.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Three non-timer axes stack: 1-hit lives (touch = death), ring containment (closed physical arena), recoil cost (firing makes you harder to control). No countdown timer exists in the build.
idea.lose_condition: Capsule centre distance from arena centre >= ARENA_R (crossed the red ring) OR any enemy's distance to capsule oriented segment < (CAPSULE_R + ENEMY_R). Checked every frame in update().

sources.title: Sausage-with-laser meme (baxxstudio/4585)
sources.snippet: BaxxStudio's sausage-with-laser meme posted to indie devs — visual gag picked up as a viable mechanic seed. Cross-pollinated with CrazyGames ragdoll cluster (Ragdoll Factory Idle, Fun Ragdoll Challenge, Stickman Hook) to find the gameplay loop.

sources.title: Ragdoll Factory Idle / Fun Ragdoll Challenge / Stickman Hook
sources.snippet: Wobbly physics protagonists are a proven CrazyGames category. Stickman Hook in particular shows that one-button physics-aim works at scale. Sausage Beam takes the wobbly-body idea and bolts a recoil-firing weapon onto it.

sources.title: No reverse-physics arena shooter on Yandex / CrazyGames / GameDistribution
sources.snippet: Tim's 74 shipped games include no physics arena shooter where the act of firing your weapon physically disadvantages you. The recoil-as-cost mechanic is well-explored in Asteroids-style space games but absent from on-foot top-down shooters.

sources.title: Today's market-signals scan rated this as shippable today, 7 tunables
sources.snippet: Selected from today's 9-idea synthesis (Pruner's Tower, Hex Tribute, Drift Forge, Sausage Beam, Tiny Dice Detective, Lasso Knot, Council of Tiles, Bills Reverse, Quadrober Cleanse). Pressure axes already non-timer (lives + containment + recoil).

synthesizer_brief: Leader brief: ship a physics arena shooter where firing your weapon is the dominant pressure axis. The sausage form factor (long capsule, laser at one end) makes the recoil-vs-aim coupling readable at a glance; the ring arena makes containment a physical pressure that any player intuits in 3 seconds.

alternatives.title: Pruner's Tower
alternatives.hook: Tower-defense in reverse — start with a maxed defense grid and REMOVE turrets each wave to satisfy budget constraints.
alternatives.mutation_of: Yandex strategy cluster + Telegram 'Skill Burn' pruning signal
alternatives.why_novel: Subtractive TD where the META challenge is which towers to sacrifice — built today as 74_pruners_tower.

alternatives.title: Hex Tribute
alternatives.hook: Place hex tiles on a colony grid; each wave demands a specific resource ratio or the colony dies.
alternatives.mutation_of: Hex puzzle cluster + Catan-style resource pacing
alternatives.why_novel: Resource-quota progression on a hex grid — but tile-based puzzles already represented (anti_match, mirror_match).

alternatives.title: Drift Forge
alternatives.hook: Drift your car along glowing arcs to forge weapons — tighter arcs = better gear.
alternatives.why_novel: Drift-as-crafting is a fresh framing, but car physics in vanilla canvas eats more than one session.

alternatives.title: Tiny Dice Detective
alternatives.hook: Solve a 6-scene case by allocating 2 stat points after each scene and beating 2d6 dice checks — 3 fails and the trail goes cold.
alternatives.mutation_of: Telegram Tiny Dice Case signal + itch narrative cluster
alternatives.why_novel: Narrative + dice-check loop — but text-heavy, less viscerally readable than Sausage Beam's mechanic.

alternatives.title: Lasso Knot
alternatives.hook: Throw a lasso and tighten a knot around moving targets — looser loops bag bigger combos.
alternatives.why_novel: Rope physics in canvas is a deep rabbit hole; deferred to a session with more rope-tuning time.
